title: Zob's Mining World
body:
Remember when Minecraft mods were just a bunch of cool ideas smashed together with zero balance and 100% fun? That’s Zob's Mining World.

It started as a Mining Dimension—because strip-mining the Overworld is ugly. Then things got out of hand. Now there are machines, an energy system held together with anomaly powder, and a bunch of random tech slapped on just because it felt right.

Nothing is polished. Nothing needs to be.
It’s a messy pile of fun—like the old modpacks where nothing made sense, but somehow, everything worked.

Wanna automate stuff? You’ll figure it out.
Wanna break the game? That’s part of the charm.
Wanna just chill? Go mine some Erectum Ore and vibe.

No balance, no stress—just weird, nostalgic, old-school modding vibes.
